The '''Nal Raka Criminal Empire ''' was [[Borvo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] criminal organization.

==Description==
It was huge, having outposts on dozens of [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Two such places were [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. It dealt mainly in [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]], gunrunning and occasionally [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trading and [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]. During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Naboo crisis]], Borvo's empire started to fall apart. After the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it regained its power and grew due to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] strict control of goods and arms. Borvo had employees in every major city on Naboo, as well as making the [[Nal Raka Space]] in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]] and taking over the [[Old Trade Federation Route/Legends|Old Trade Federation Route]].

In space battles, Borvo's pilots flew [[M3-A Scyk interceptor/Legends|M3-A Scyk fighters]], [[G1-M4-C Dunelizard fighter]]s and [[M12-L Kimogila heavy fighter]]s.<ref name="SWG:Ns">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=other|Naboo system}}</ref>

==History==
===Invasion of Naboo===
During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], Borvo the Hutt was blocked on the planet and found himself forced to fight the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] alongside the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

===Galactic Civil War===
{{Quote|Well, both the Skaak Tippers and the Darkwalkers view Borvo's organization as a rival and want them knocked down a peg or two.|[[Hugo Eckener/Legends|Hugo Eckener]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:EHB">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Everyone Hates Borvo|Naboo}}</ref>}}
By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Nal Raka Criminal Empire was considered by the [[RSF Intelligence Division]] as one of the four major criminal groups on Naboo, along with the [[Skaak Tippers]], the [[Mummers]] and the [[Darkwalkers]].<ref name="SWG:TtCotFMCG" /> Borvo's organization had hostile relationships with the Skaak Tippers and the Darkwalkers.<ref name="SWG:EHB" /> Borvo also had problems with [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] after the Battle of Yavin. After a group of Gungan traders crossed him, he sent his most feared champion, the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Mordran]], to terrorize Gungans at the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]].<ref name="SWG:Mordran">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Mordran|Naboo}}</ref>

Prior to the Battle of Yavin, Agent [[Niksel Frangee]], a detective of the [[Corellian Security Force]], infiltrated Borvo the Hutt's criminal organization.<ref name="SWG:BGATTC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Borvo's Guard - A Trip To Corellia|Naboo}}</ref> Frangee stayed undercover for the next six years<ref name="SWG:BC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Bluffing CorSec|Corellia}}</ref> and became one of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] most trusted employees.<ref name="SWG:BG" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the CorSec investigation against Borvo the Hutt came to an end.<ref name="SWG:BC" /> An important [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] operation was therefore organized to trap the gang during an illegal weapon sale near [[Moenia/Legends|Moenia]]. The mission was a success and almost every Borvo's men were killed or arrested. Only [[Dagorel]], Borvo's hand man, escaped but the criminal was able to report Frangee's treason to Borvo.<ref name="SWG:BtHG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Borvo The Hutt's Guard|Naboo}}</ref> [[Borvo's guard]] therefore hired a spacer to murder Frangee.<ref name="SWG:BG">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Borvo's Guard|Naboo}}</ref> The spacer later took Frangee's detective badge and was ordered to go on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to pass himself off as Frangee. Indeed, during his six years in infiltration, all of Frangee's direct superiors had retired and been replaced. Thus, nobody in the CorSec knew how Frangee looked like at the moment of his death.<ref name="SWG:BGATTC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Borvo's Guard - A Trip To Corellia|Naboo}}</ref> The spacer met one of the CorSec senior officers, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Thale Dustrunner]], in the [[Coronet Capitol]]. Dustrunner fell for the ruse and took the spacer for the long lost agent. He ordered him to protect [[Aldalad]], a witness who wanted to testify against Borvo, and [[Maerzen]], who had discovered evidence against Borvo the Hutt. The spacer killed both of them and returned to Borvo, leaving the CorSec without any evidence against the Hutt crime lord.<ref name="SWG:BC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Bluffing CorSec|Corellia}}</ref> Eventually, Borvo concluded this messy crisis by assassinating his ex-business partner [[Montrus]] because of his close relationship with Niksel Frangee.<ref name="SWG:BA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Borvo's Assignments|Naboo}}</ref>

Around the sme time, the Skaak Tippers and Darkwalkers blackmailed [[Hugo Eckener/Legends|Hugo Eckener]], the father of the indebted [[Karl Eckener]], to force him to hire a spacer in order to attack [[Borvo Bunker]], near [[Theed/Legends|Theed]].<ref name="SWG:EHB" /> One of Borvo's thug, [[Derm Worrit]], operated out of the bunker during that time.<ref name="SWG:FaEM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Find an Escaped Murderer|Naboo}}</ref>
